title: About Würth UAE
text: Würth is a global market leader in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of assembly and fastening materials, including screws, bolts, anchors, chemical products, tools, and installation material. The Würth Group operates in more than 80 countries with a large direct sales force. Würth Gulf FZE / Würth UAE serves customers across the United Arab Emirates in industries such as automotive, construction, metal and manufacturing, wood, MRO (maintenance, repair, and operations), and electrical trades.

title: Würth product range
text: Würth's product range includes fasteners (screws, bolts, nuts, washers, anchors, rivets), chemical and adhesive products (sealants, lubricants, cleaners, threadlockers, sprays), hand tools and power tools, personal protective equipment (PPE) and workwear, storage and warehouse systems (shelving, bins, cabinets), automotive workshop equipment and consumables, and electrical installation material such as cable ties, connectors, and wiring accessories.

title: Industries Würth UAE serves
text: Würth UAE supplies businesses across multiple sectors: automotive repair and service workshops, construction and building contractors, metal fabrication and manufacturing companies, woodworking and furniture manufacturers, MRO (maintenance, repair and operations) for industrial facilities, and electrical and MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) contractors. Products and service levels are tailored to each industry's typical needs.

title: Würth eshop / online ordering
text: Würth UAE offers an online shop (eshop.wurth.ae) where registered business customers can browse the product catalog, check availability, and place orders online in addition to ordering through their assigned sales representative. Customers typically need an account linked to their company to see contract pricing and place orders.

title: Würth sales representative model
text: Würth's business model is built around direct, in-person sales representatives ("Verkaufsberater") who are assigned to specific customer companies and regions. Each business customer typically has one dedicated sales representative who visits regularly, understands the customer's stock and ordering needs, and is the main point of contact for quotes, pricing, order status, product recommendations, and account issues. For pricing, quotations, and order-specific questions, customers should be directed to their assigned sales representative.

title: Würth ORSY storage and organization systems
text: Würth offers the ORSY system, a modular storage, labeling, and inventory organization solution for workshops and warehouses. It is used to keep fasteners, tools, and small parts organized on-site, and can be integrated with Würth's replenishment and reordering services so that assigned sales representatives restock items automatically based on usage.

title: Würth quality and certification
text: Würth products are manufactured and sourced to meet international quality and industry standards (such as DIN, ISO, and automotive OEM specifications depending on the product line). Many Würth chemical and fastening products include technical data sheets (TDS) and safety data sheets (SDS) available on request through the sales representative or customer service.

title: Contacting Würth UAE
text: For general inquiries, new account setup, or if a customer does not yet have an assigned sales representative, they can be directed to contact Würth UAE's main customer service channel. Existing customers with an assigned sales representative should reach out to that representative directly for the fastest response on pricing, orders, and product availability.
